guard_checks.mutation_scope: prep artifact only; no LOG.md, manifest, merges.json, canonical JSONL, wiki, submissions, database, materialized, or generated outputs intentionally changed

corridor_limits_guard.method: Only proposed same-name Phase II corridor records with matching canonical payload scope and no conflicting from/to/limits fields. Excluded narrower street-segment clusters and route-variant clusters.
